/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/culane_evaluator.dir/src/counter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/culane_evaluator.dir/src/evaluate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/culane_evaluator.dir/src/lane_compare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/culane_evaluator.dir/src/spline.cpp.o  -o culane_evaluator  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gzp/app/lib /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0 /home/gzp/app/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.10.0 -lgomp -lpthread
